mission.title: vitess: RFC: New vtgate Metrics
mission.description: RFC: New vtgate Metrics. Community-requested feature.

steps.title: Check current vitess deployment
steps.description:
Verify your vtctldclient --version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n vitess -l app.kubernetes.io/name=vitess
helm list -n vitess 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working vitess installation.

steps.title: Review vitess configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant vitess configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n vitess -l app.kubernetes.io/name=vitess
kubectl get configmap -n vitess -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=vitess
```
## 1. Summary
Vitess currently classifies query plan types in a way that is neither intuitive nor helpful for performance analysis.

steps.title: Apply the fix for RFC: New vtgate Metrics
steps.description:
This PR adds classification of query plans based on their execution strategy. 
Additionally, it deprecates four metrics and introduces three replacements.

The Queries metric counter, which tracks queries processed at VTGate, will be published with Query, Plan, and Tablet type labels. This improves
```yaml
# HELP vtgate_query_executions Counts queries executed at VTGate by query type, plan type, and tablet type.
# TYPE vtgate_query_executions counter
vtgate_query_executions{plan="Complex",query="SELECT",tablet="PRIMARY"} 1
vtgate_query_executions{plan="Join",query="SELECT",tablet="PRIMARY"} 1
vtgate_query_executions{plan="Local",query="SET",tablet="PRIMARY"} 2
vtgate_query_executions{plan="Local",query="USE",tablet="PRIMARY"} 1
vtgate_query_executions{plan="Lookup",query="SELECT",tablet="PRIMARY"} 1
vtgate_query_executions{plan="MultiShard",query="DELETE",tablet="PRIMARY"} 1
vtgate_query_executi
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n vitess -l app.kubernetes.io/name=vitess
kubectl get events -n vitess --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "RFC: New vtgate Metrics" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
This PR adds classification of query plans based on their execution strategy. 
Additionally, it deprecates four metrics and introduces three replacements.

The Queries metric counter, which tracks queries processed at VTGate, will be published with Query, Plan, and Tablet type labels. This improves observability into query distribution and execution patterns.
codeSnippets:
# HELP vtgate_query_executions Counts queries executed at VTGate by query type, plan type, and tablet type.
# TYPE vtgate_query_executions counter
vtgate_query_executions{plan="Complex",query="SELECT",tablet="PRIMARY"} 1
vtgate_query_executions{plan="Join",query="SELECT",tablet="PRIMARY"} 1
vtgate_query_executions{plan="Local",query="SET",tablet="PRIMARY"} 2
vtgate_query_executions{plan="Local",query="USE",tablet="PRIMARY"} 1
vtgate_query_executions{plan="Lookup",query="SELECT",tablet="PRIMARY"} 1
vtgate_query_executions{plan="MultiShard",query="DELETE",tablet="PRIMARY"} 1
vtgate_query_executions{plan="MultiShard",query="SET",tablet="PRIMARY"} 1
vtgate_query_executions{plan="MultiShard",query="UPDATE",tablet="PRIMARY"} 1
vtgate_query_executions{plan="Passthrough",query="SHOW",tablet="PRIMA

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with vitess installed or the issue environment reproducible.
